content.full_text:
October 5, 1988

Mr. W. R. Zoerb
Secretary/Treasurer, Local 1180
Fresno County Fire Fighters Association
P.O. Box 13025
Fresno, CA  93794

Your Request for Advice
Our File No. I-88-351

Dear Mr. Zoerb:

     You have requested advice under the campaign disclosure
provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1/  Your
letter states only a general question.  Therefore, we consider
it to be a request for informal assistance pursuant to
Regulation 18329(c) (copy enclosed).2/

QUESTION

     May an association transfer money from the association's
separate benefit fund (general fund monies) to the
association's political action committee? How is the transfer
of funds reported?

CONCLUSION

     The association may transfer funds from its separate
benefit fund to its political action committee.  The funds
transferred are reported as monetary contributions to the
political action committee from the association.  For your
information, FPPC Regulation 18419 (copy enclosed) provides
detailed information for reporting contributions the committee
receives from members of the association.

_________________________________________________

1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015.  All statutory
references are to the Government Code unless otherwise
indicated.  Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code
of Regulations Section 18000, et seq.  All references to
regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code
of Regulations.

2/ Informal assistance does not provide the requestor with
the immunity provided by an opinion or formal written advice
(Section 84113; Regulation 18329(c)(3).)

428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916)322-5660

Mr. W. R. Zoerb
Page 2


If you need additional assistance concerning this matter,
please contact me at 916/322-5662.

Sincerely,

Diane M. Griffiths
General Counsel

[signature]

By: Mary Ann Kvasager
Political Reform Consultant


Enclosures
DMG:MAK:

FRESNO COUNTY FIRE FIGHTERS ASSOCIATION
P.O. BOX 13025 • FRESNO, CALIFORNIA 93784

JUL 3 1988 August 29, 1988

Mary Ann Kvasazer
Fair Political Practice Commission
428 J St.
Sacramento Calif., 95814

Mary Ann,

I'm writing this letter in response to your conversation
recently with Rudy Sudiana concerning certain issues about
our newly formed P.A.C. fund. As I'm sure Rudy told you this
is our first experience dealing with the proper procedures in
making contributions to political individuals and issues. The
main issue concerning us at present is whether or not it is
proper to transfer monies from the Associations seperate ben-
efit fund to the P.A.C. fund, and if so how does this need to
be documented.

I'd like to thank you for your time and consideration re-
garding this matter and to also request any additional material
I might need to help in the future.

Sincerely,

W.R. Zoeth
Sec./Tres., Local 1190

88-351

FRESNO COUNTY FIRE FIGHTERS ASSOCIATION
P.O. BOX 13025 • FRESNO, CALIFORNIA 93794

JUL 6 3 40PM August 29, 1988

Mary Ann Kwasniewski
Fair Political Practice Commission
428 J St.
Sacramento Calif., 95814

Mary Ann,

I'm writing this letter in response to your conversation
recently with Rudy Guadiana concerning certain issues about
our newly formed P.A.C. fund. As I'm sure Rudy told you this
is our first experience dealing with the proper procedures in
making contributions to political issues and individuals. The
main issue concerning us at present is whether or not it is
proper to transfer monies from the Associations seperate ben-
efit fund to the P.A.C. fund, and if so how does this need to
be documented.

I'd like to thank you for your time and consideration re-
garding this matter and to also request any additional material
I might need to help in the future.

Sincerely,

[signature]
W.R. Zoechi
Sec./Tres., Local 1180

28423
